asset_name: Cibinetide / ARA-290 Pivotal Human Evidence Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Primary human efficacy and translation evidence
evidence_grade: B1 — pivotal, major randomised or defined phase 2/3 human evidence
controlled_conclusion: Small phase 2 studies evaluated ARA-290/cibinetide in sarcoidosis-associated small-fibre neuropathy, type 2 diabetes with neuropathic symptoms and diabetic macular oedema. These studies were limited in size and duration and do not establish a broadly authorised neuropathy, inflammatory or regenerative therapy.

sources.title: ARA-290 type 2 diabetes and neuropathy phase 2 study
Cibinetide diabetic macular oedema phase 2 study

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised, sponsor or trial product to catalogue supplier material
Creation of personal dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
Representation of orphan designation or trial registration as marketing authorisation
next_review_trigger: Material approval, label, trial-result, safety, warning, recall, manufacturer, quality, anti-doping or supplier-evidence change
